nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms. Partly cloudy. Low around 72, with temperatures rising to around 74 overnight. East wind around 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Friday
nws.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms Likely then Mostly Sunny
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 7am, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 7am and 11am. Mostly sunny, with a high near 91. Southeast wind 9 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms between 8pm and 10pm, then showers and thunderstorms between 10pm and 1am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 1am and 2am, then showers and thunderstorms likely between 2am and 3am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 3am and 4am. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Mostly cloudy. Low around 71, with temperatures rising to around 73 overnight. Southeast wind 8 to 16 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between three quarters and one inch possible.

nws.name: Independence Day
nws.detailedForecast: Partly sunny, with a high near 89. Northwest wind around 8 mph. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Saturday Night
